rationale: Add remote URL source, nested/context list values, raw strings, path expansions, and malformed binary to hit uncovered code paths

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' extra_context_value
    ;

extra_context_value
    : STRING                     // raw string, e.g., "yes", "no"
    | json_bool
    | list_literal
    | object_literal
    ;

list_literal
    : '[' (STRING (',' STRING)*)? ']'
    ;

object_literal
    : '{' (STRING ':' extra_context_value (',' STRING ':' extra_context_value)*)? '}'
    ;

STRING
    : '"' (~'"')* '"'
    ;

binary_contents
    : '"AAECAwQ="'
    | '"c29tZS1iaW5hcnktYnl0ZXM="'
    | '"@@@invalid-base64@@@"' // malformed to trigger decode error
    ;
